zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche於1183年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦維恩--亞迪斯時，他的父親Hugh de Lusignan25歲，母親Agathe de Preuilly26歲。他於1220年10月5日與Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1249年6月5日在埃及دمياط達米艾塔享年66歲，埋葬在法國波特-哈倫斯維安蒙特莫利隆庫賀。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche于1183年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦維恩--亞迪斯时，他的父亲Hugh de Lusignan25岁，母亲Agathe de Preuilly26岁。他于1220年10月5日与Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1249年6月5日在埃及دمياط達米艾塔享年66岁，埋葬在法国波特-哈倫斯維安蒙特莫利隆庫賀。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche was born in 1183, in Vienne-en-Arthies, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, his father, Hugh de Lusignan, was 25 and his mother, Agathe de Preuilly, was 26. He married Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England on 5 October 1220. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 5 June 1249, in Damietta, Damietta, Egypt, at the age of 66, and was buried in Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche est né en 1183, à Vienne-en-Arthies, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, son père, Hugh de Lusignan, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agathe de Preuilly, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England le 5 octobre 1220. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1249, à Damietta, Damietta, Égypte, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche 1183 in Vienne-en-Arthies, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Lusignan 25 und seine Mutter Agathe de Preuilly 26. Er hat am 5. Oktober 1220 Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Juni 1249 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Damietta, Damietta, Ägypten und wurde in Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche è nato il nel 1183 nel Vienne-en-Arthies, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh de Lusignan, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Agathe de Preuilly, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England il 5 ottobre 1220. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 5 giugno 1249, nel Damietta, Damietta, Egitto, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marcheが1183年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼヴィエネ-エン-アルスイスで生まれた時，父Hugh de Lusignanは25歳，母Agathe de Preuillyは26歳であった。1220年10月5日にIsabelle d'Angoulême Queen of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1249年6月5日にエジプトدمياطダミエッタで66歳で死去し，フランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンモントモーイロンコウheにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche(이)가 1183년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 비니--아르스이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Lusignan(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Agathe de Preuilly(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1220년 10월 5일 Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1249년 6월 5일 이집트 دمياط 데이미타에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 몽모릴런 코우he에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche nasceu em 1183, em Vienne-en-Arthies, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Hugh de Lusignan, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agathe de Preuilly, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England em 5 de outubro de 1220. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1249, em Damietta, Damietta, Egipto, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche родился в 1183 г. в местности виенне-ен-артиесь, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh de Lusignan было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agathe de Preuilly, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England 5 октября 1220 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 5 июня 1249 г. в местности дэимиетто, دمياط, Египет в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности коухe, монтмориллон, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche nació en 1183, en Vienne-en-Arthies, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Lusignan, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agathe de Preuilly, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England el 5 de octubre de 1220. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 5 de junio de 1249, en Damietta, Damietta, Egipto, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Couhé, Montmorillon, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia.
